comment.body:
they forsaw spot up/vol up last year... but still sold short-term vol and longed long-term vol, (calendar spread), long delta...
and when their prediction came true... bye bye premium

comment.body:
if Trump would be lying, market would price out even further. 
Market is tired. momentum is lost. Market doesn't react on ongoing talks (not even negotiations... only preparations), bcs market would react on ACTS, actual RESULTS. I tell it everyday.
Market has nothing to rally on, only mechanical flows. This is why investors are still leaving for now. 

Odds start to favor for US now, as I expected, to win the poker battle... but this is only odds, not results.
No deals, no ceasefire, no QE, still stagflation.

comment.body:
it was an interesenting mailout from ISW last night re: Iran Nuclear capabilities and potential possible upcoming strike..  Key Takeaways:

Iran-US Nuclear Negotiations: Iran reportedly asked the United States during nuclear talks in Rome on April 19 to negotiate an interim deal, according to two unspecified sources with knowledge of the issue who spoke to Axios. CTP-ISW previously assessed that Iran may calculate that an interim deal with the United States could delay or prevent the imposition of snapback sanctions by European JCPOA signatories or a potential US or Israeli strike on Iranian nuclear facilities.

Iranian Air Defense Inspections: Senior Iranian military officials appear to be preparing for possible US or Israeli strikes on Iranian nuclear facilities.

comment.body: Alma 5384.96 zero Vanna, charm is flat and if it is flat means that the delta change has the most effect based only on Vanna so vol and IV. What I’m seeing on my IV tracking software is that on today’s expo the IV is not crushing as it should while time passes, instead IV is increasing( I’m tracking it from 18:00 utc +2 in this leg up). Is this due to the flat charm profile? And this is why the squeeze if occurs is due to Vanna? Above the 0 Vanna how is the profile ? (Positive or negative ) being charm flat is curios. What we want to see on the vol profile as long as the squeeze has more prob to come (I hope I didn’t cause too much confusion).
